description: It's month-end at Wind Power LLC. You need to reconcile five transactions from the 'First National Bank - WP' bank account using ERPNext's Bank Reconciliation Tool. The bank statement shows 5 cleared transactions (3 deposits, 2 withdrawals) which have already been entered as Payment Entries in the system. Log in to ERPNext (credentials: Administrator / admin), navigate to the Bank Reconciliation Tool, select the 'First National Bank - WP' account, and match all 5 unreconciled bank transactions to their corresponding Payment Entries. Ensure all 5 show as 'Reconciled'.
